flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Grace College and Theological Seminary rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Grace College and Theological Seminary rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Grace College and Theological Seminary fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
